name: Mode Switcher
description: Self-escalating conversation modes — upgrades to a smarter model when it matters, reverts automatically when it's done.

modes.description: Map of mode name to mode configuration. Each mode can override the model, thinking, and turn limit.

description.description: Human-readable description shown in the tool definition

model.description: Model identifier to use when this mode is active. null = use the session default.

thinking.description: Thinking budget or mode hint passed to the model. null = model default.

maxTurns.description: Number of turns before auto-reverting to baseline. null = no limit.
